chapter_title.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ غُلَامُهُ جَارِيَةً حُرَّةً فَقَالَ الطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْغُلَامِ فَإِنْ تَزَوَّجَهَا بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ فَالطَّلَاقُ بِيَدِ الْمَوْلَى .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from Muhammad Bin Ziyad, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married his slave to a slave girl of a free woman. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is by the hand of the slave. So if he married her without the permission of his master, so the divorce is in the hand of the master’.
